textByHashes.d37494e21f203ab56bc3f510914cd0a8af4e0f8b: We didn't see any others... It was just us and Antos...
textByHashes.579610a5b97786d14c41fab16ae48ec9895b2e96: Yes! He makes bows for the guards. We'd see him sometimes when dad would go with him to the pub, but he wasn't in the pub! He was in the cave!
textByHashes.7e16582a432aedc6072f309f60139f9d7b95b547: And thank you for saving Antos as well!
